findings.title: Insecure CORS wildcard detected
findings.description: Using wildcard CORS origins may allow untrusted websites to interact with the API.
findings.recommendation: Restrict CORS origins to trusted frontend domains.

findings.title: LLM review failed

findings.recommendation: Check Ollama availability and retry the LLM review.

security_gate.reason: Security gate warning because Medium severity findings were detected.
security_gate.policy: WARN if Medium findings exist and no Critical or blocking High findings exist.

fix_suggestions.recommended_fix: Remove eval/exec usage and replace it with safe parsing or explicit controlled logic.
fix_suggestions.example_fix: Use json.loads(user_input) for JSON data instead of eval(user_input).

fix_suggestions.recommended_fix: Review the finding and apply a secure coding fix based on the recommendation.
